attributes.action: Reduce NHS waiting times for endometriosis diagnosis and surgery
attributes.additional_details: Women with suspected endometriosis and severe gynaecological symptoms can face years of waiting for diagnosis and treatment. I have personally been told NHS Tayside waiting times for diagnostic laparoscopy are around 150 weeks, almost 3 years. Delays can leave women struggling physically and mentally, affect daily life, work and relationships, and leave many suffering without answers. Faster access to diagnosis and treatment is urgently needed.
attributes.background: I would like the UK Government to reduce NHS waiting times for endometriosis diagnosis and treatment.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756697

Also, health is a devolved matter - if you are concerned about the situation in Scotland, you may want to start a petition about this at the Scottish Parliament petitions website, here:

https://petitions.parliament.scot/
